economic_notes: First Nation is in Level Two ISC intervention. Lionel Head Memorial Store is a consolidated commercial enterprise. COVID-19 funding received for community assistance, preparedness and response. Multiple capital infrastructure projects underway including water supply, lagoon repairs, road upgrades, and river dike extension.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). First Nation is in ISC Level Two intervention with a Recipient Appointed Advisor. Three entities fully consolidated: Red Earth Cree Nation Health Services, Section 95 Social Housing Operation, and Red Earth Cree Developments Inc. (Lionel Head Memorial Store). Portfolio investments include Red Earth Development Corporation (100%) and Red Earth Development LP (100%) accounted at cost. Restricted cash includes $10,002,327 capital project funds and $793,389 CMHC reserves. Accumulated surplus per financial statements is $38,108,588 but note 14 shows $38,198,718 - minor discrepancy in statements. ISC payable of $1,289,243 has been outstanding since prior year. Audit report dated January 26, 2023 - significantly delayed. CMHC reserves underfunded by $1,143,303. The statement of financial position shows 2021 and 2020 columns but headers label them as 2021 and 2024 - this appears to be a typo in the original document.
